_comment: Shipped preset for SAM3 point/box segmentation. The stage sends one runner invocation per point-group (all points in a run refine ONE object) and a single invocation carrying every box (SAM3_Detect emits one mask per box). positive/negative_coords are JSON strings ([{"x":..,"y":..},..], source-image pixel coords); bboxes is a literal list of {x,y,width,height} dicts — the in-process nested executor skips validate_prompt, so literal injection on the BOUNDING_BOX input is fine. individual_masks=true keeps per-object masks; InvertMask is required because JoinImageWithAlpha writes alpha = 1 - mask.
label: SAM3 Points & Boxes
description: Segment parts with SAM3.1 point/box prompts. Upstream image → LoadImage; card annotations → SAM3_Detect coords/bboxes. Outputs one transparent-bg PNG per part (COMFYTV_IMAGES). Needs sam3.1_multiplex_fp16.safetensors in models/checkpoints.

image.error: Split Parts needs an upstream image — wire one into the stage's image input.
